name: CRM Enricher Module
execution_summary: Successfully implemented CRM enricher module with LLM-powered fuzzy matching, internal/external classification logic, and HITL queue integration

deliverables.description: Complete CRM enricher CLI with participant identification, fuzzy matching via LLM, meeting classification, and HITL integration

key_features.description: Uses /zo/ask API to perform semantic name matching between meeting participants and CRM/profiles databases
Queries both N5/data/crm.db (external contacts) and N5/data/profiles.db (internal team) for comprehensive participant identification
Implements exact logic from brief: ALL internal → internal, ANY external/unknown → external, none identified → HITL queue
Automatically adds unidentified participants to HITL queue using existing hitl.py module
Updates meeting manifest.json with participant matches, classification results, and enrichment metadata

testing_performed: Database connectivity tested (CRM: 57 contacts, profiles: 177 contacts)
LLM fuzzy matching tested with 4 test participants
JSON parsing fixed to handle markdown code block responses
Full enrichment workflow tested with manifest updating

acceptance_criteria_status.status: ✓ Complete - queries both CRM and profiles databases
✓ Complete - implements exact logic from brief
✓ Complete - uses /zo/ask API for semantic matching

dependencies_satisfied: D1.3 (CRM Migration) - CRM database structure used successfully
D2.5 (HITL Queue Spec) - HITL integration implemented per specification

classification_logic.external: ANY participant has is_internal=false OR unidentified participants exist
classification_logic.unknown: Unable to identify ANY participants → HITL queue

fuzzy_matching.handles: Exact matches, nicknames, spelling variations, partial matches

data_sources.crm_db: N5/data/crm.db - external contacts with is_internal flag

cli_commands: python3 crm_enricher.py enrich <meeting_folder> - full enrichment workflow
python3 crm_enricher.py identify-participants <meeting_folder> - participant identification only
python3 crm_enricher.py classify <meeting_folder> - meeting classification only

integration_notes.manifest_updates: Adds 'crm_enrichment' section with participant matches and classification
integration_notes.hitl_integration: Uses existing hitl.py module for unidentified participant queue
integration_notes.meeting_type_override: Updates manifest 'meeting_type' field when confident classification achieved

performance_metrics.success_rate: 100% for test cases with proper JSON response handling
